title: The Iran war has put the brakes on the next Bank of England rate cut
summary_full: Before the war in Iran erupted, the Bank of England was widely predicted to be set to cut interest rates in March or April. Don't count on it, economists say.
summary_public: Before the war in Iran erupted, the Bank of England was widely predicted to be set to cut interest rates in March or April. Don't count on it, economists say.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: The Iran war has put the brakes on
